# CMSDecoder

**Class**

An opaque reference to a CMS decoder object.

## Declaration

```swift
class CMSDecoder
```

## Overview

This is object is compatible with Core Foundation and uses standard Core Foundation semantics. Dispose of it with the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFRelease] function.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
